station_address: Shop No 2, Lotus Petrol Pump, Shakti nagar, Adarsh Nagar, Jogeshwari West, Mumbai, Maharashtra 400102
text:
Very crowded, but good quality and good service. Also all peripheral services like PUC, Nitrogen, CNG, etc are all available. The location is convenient.
Kudos to the management for retaining the original, beautiful architecture, making it a unique mini-destination

station_address: Shop No 2, Lotus Petrol Pump, Shakti nagar, Adarsh Nagar, Jogeshwari West, Mumbai, Maharashtra 400102
text:
‼️The Shape of the structure was the Bold & unique at that time‼️

From Service point of view, I feel they could have evolved much more as compared to any other. Being the first mover in revolutionising the traditional Petrol Pump, it has not done justice to the head start they got but enhancing the facilities and services to International standards.

Hopefully they could do going forward.

station_address: Shop No 2, Lotus Petrol Pump, Shakti nagar, Adarsh Nagar, Jogeshwari West, Mumbai, Maharashtra 400102
text:
Reliable one stop shop for all your vehicles fuelling and typical needs. This is a trusted facility having some repair and service offerings at site. Insurance and Western Union facilities are also here.

Parking may be a bit of a challenge as this is a high traffic fuel station.

text: Veey old petrol pump located on Andheri link Rd near Lower Oshiwara Metro station. The place offers Petrol, Diesel and CNG, All payment mode is accepted and open 24/7.The staff is very polite and cooperative. They also have Air ans Nitrogen Gas.
